title: SMTBMC: Assume A on posedge clk and assert A together fail
body:
I would expect assume(A) and assert(A) to succeed.  However, if (A) is assumed on the positive edge of a clock, as is necessary in order to use $past, then it's possible for the assert(A) to fail if asserted independent of a clock.

See https://zipcpu.com/tmp/ybuga.tgz for a minimal example.

Dan
